text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki seems under the weather, so I send
her to the infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My deepest apologies. I'll be sure to get proper
rest to avoid causing you further concern.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm?! What is this place?

text_block_list.name: Crow Tengu
text_block_list.text: So you awaken, young one.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Gyah! You're... a tengu?!

text_block_list.name: Crow Tengu
text_block_list.text:
For you to have been brought here before me...
You must desire to undergo my training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I-I've heard that, in ancient times, the names of
warriors who studied under the tengu spread far
and wide.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It would be an honor to receive your instruction!

text_block_list.name: Crow Tengu
text_block_list.text:
Hah... In that case, follow me! If you can keep up,
that is!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ridiculous! Even if I'm out of sorts, I'll chase you
for a thousand miles if it means attaining mastery!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Is that all?

text_block_list.name: Crow Tengu
text_block_list.text:
A fine performance, Yaeno Muteki! Heh-heh...
You certainly don't appear to be out of sorts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! Now that you mention it... I was so absorbed
in running that I started sprinting without even
realizing it!

text_block_list.name: Crow Tengu
text_block_list.text:
You look to be past your troubles. Good. Now,
return to the world from whence you came!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Master Tengu. Thank you for your guidance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is brimming with energy, showing
no signs of being unwell. I guess she had a pretty
nice dream.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Agh! The sheer speed—I can't hope to catch up!

text_block_list.name: Crow Tengu
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... You have a long way to go, Yaeno
Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What is the meaning of this?! I couldn't even
complete training in my own dreams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she's rested up, Yaeno Muteki remains
out of sorts.
